domain.name: Business Taxonomy
domain.description: Categories within Brand Verticals that narrow down the scope of Brands

entity.name: Sports & Fitness Business
entity.description: Brands, companies, advertisers and every non-person handle with the profit intent related to sports nutrition, athletic apparel, sports apps, fitness venues

domain.name: Business Taxonomy
domain.description: Categories within Brand Verticals that narrow down the scope of Brands

entity.name: Technology Business
entity.description: Brands, companies, advertisers and every non-person handle with the profit intent related to softwares, apps, communication equipments, hardwares

domain.name: Business Taxonomy
domain.description: Categories within Brand Verticals that narrow down the scope of Brands

entity.name: Textile, Apparel & Luxury Good Business
entity.description: Brands, companies, advertisers and every non-person handle with the profit intent related to apparel and accessories

domain.name: Product
domain.description: Products created by Brands.  Examples: Ford Explorer, Apple iPhone.

data.text: 关于运动是一个“活着会动”的水平...笑不活了。解释本来用apple watch就是监测下睡眠结果睡眠也摆了，已经没勇气回睡眠科见医生（） https://t.co/fsnE9KWwan

users.description: 穿越语言的壳，任思维溢出容器——请听，离群者无法永恒的悲歌。炽在水洼中的倒影，因为星光获得了生命 /Per aspera ad astra.
users.name: Pale Fire
